title: 30 Tangent Color theme discussion
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 Tangent: Color-theme discussion             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Jan 18, 2012 6:20 am Ornette wrote: maybe FINAL will be white?

[]:             Quote Post by Draconis » Wed Jan 18, 2012 7:28 am At least 4.0 isn't supposed to be long after 3.0 is out. Hope FUNimation doesn't take 2 years to put out their damn BD...

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Wed Jan 18, 2012 8:13 am Ornette wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jan 18, 2012 8:15 am Draconis wrote: Hope FUNimation doesn't take 2 years to put out their damn BD...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 18, 2012 11:28 am Ornette wrote: maybe FINAL will be white?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 18, 2012 12:55 pm Warren Peace wrote: Holy shit, between this and Asuka's eyepatch, it looks like Spencer David got to Anno after all! Pirates galore!

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Wed Jan 18, 2012 1:31 pm Interesting that they've decided to keep the "Q" even though it was supposedly just a code name. I wonder if it stands for anything or if it's just being used to sound cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 18, 2012 1:34 pm rhfxz1s wrote: Interesting that they've decided to keep the "Q" even though it was supposedly just a code name. I wonder if it stands for anything

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jan 18, 2012 2:01 pm It also sounds like "Kyu" which is the third act after Jo and Ha in Noh plays.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 18, 2012 2:04 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: It also sounds like "Kyu" which is the third act after Jo and Ha in Noh plays.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jan 18, 2012 2:08 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: It was originally JoHaKyu? 序破急？if you see the original News Flashes before 1.0 trailers were out but changed along the way, yes.

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Wed Jan 18, 2012 4:52 pm The color scheme wasn't really news, since it was known/there since January 1st when they put the tabs on the website. (Should have posted that January 1st, not now) And the choice of color seems to have been originally discussed in page 1 of this topic, but the guesses were way off, with some expecting yellow: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11487/Evangelion-Official-Website-News/0/?[/url] The colors probably describe the stages of the ascension of Shinji or humanity, Red = Sea/LCL, ala fish coming out of water in evolution Orange = Ground/Dirt, walking on land Blue = Air, ascending, but not there yet. Shinji's not god yet. White = Clouds/Heaven, god mode on

[]:             Quote Post by Xous » Wed Jan 18, 2012 5:32 pm deeRez wrote: The color scheme wasn't really news, since it was known/there since January 1st when they put the tabs on the website. (Should have posted that January 1st, not now)

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Wed Jan 18, 2012 5:34 pm Xous wrote: It already was posted on the 1st, a few pages back in this thread.[/url] (Or are you referring to something else needing to be posted on the 1st? If so I apologize.)

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Jan 18, 2012 9:00 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: So many different things it could mean! For that matter, what would 3.0's cyan/blue represent? I'm curious if the 1.0's red and 2.0's orange fit their film's themes at all or if the colors were just chosen to represent a rainbow (as we all know, NME has tons of those).

[]:             Quote Post by Rocky Raccoon » Wed Jan 18, 2012 9:56 pm image

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Jan 18, 2012 10:09 pm I just wanted to mention, that there's now a Evangelion:Q Facebook. [url]http://www.facebook.com/evangelion.co.jp[/url] In case, anybody hasn't noticed yet. likelikelikelikelikelikelikelikelike

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Thu Jan 19, 2012 12:28 pm symbv wrote: I once casually thought that Red for Unit-02, Orange for Unit-00 and so what's left should be Purple for Unit-01, but now it's cyan after all. So much for my little theory :p

[]:             Quote Post by Silioni » Sat Jan 21, 2012 3:04 pm That's *yawn* the laziest poster... They could've just taken a screencap of the 2.0 SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Jan 21, 2012 3:13 pm ...
